headline: Entergy to report first quarter 2026 financial results on April 29
summary: Entergy will report its first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens Wednesday, April 29.

headline: Entergy (ETR) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Entergy (ETR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
